# Dependencies — Line 1e (Taxable dependent care benefits from Form 2441 line 26), Form 2441, and Schedule 3 Line 2

This document covers every output produced by the line 1e / child and dependent care computation, which runs in **two passes**.

| Output | Return field | Location |
|---|---|---|
| `form1040.income.dependentCareBenefits` | Form 1040 line 1e | Taxable dependent care benefits (Form 2441 line 26) |
| `form2441` | Full Form 2441 output | Part I qualifying persons + providers; Part II lines 3–11; Part III lines 12–31 |
| `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.childDependentCareCredit` | Schedule 3 line 2 | Child and dependent care credit (Form 2441 line 11); feeds Form 1040 line 20 |

Blocking flags emitted by this pass are listed at the end.

---

## Canonical null vs zero semantic (locked 2026-05-10)

- `income.dependentCareBenefits = null` when the user has neither filled in the `childcare-expenses` form NOR has any W-2 box 10 benefits attributable to them.
- `income.dependentCareBenefits = BigDecimal.ZERO` when the user HAS filled in the form (or has W-2 box 10 benefits) AND Form 2441 Part III legitimately computes line 26 to zero (full exclusion).

Lock-in tests: `line1eIsNullWhenNoChildcareExpensesFormAndNoBox10`, `line1eIsZeroWhenChildcareExpensesFormPresentWithZeroAmount`.

---

## Two-Pass Architecture

Line 1e computation is split across two methods in `TaxReturnComputeService.java`:

| Pass | Method | Called at | Reason |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Phase 1** | `computeDependentCareBenefits()` | Inside `prepare()` — BEFORE AGI is known | Computes Part III (benefits exclusion) and seeds Part II lines 3–6; sets line 1e; AGI/tax not yet available so lines 7/8/9a/9c/10/11 are left null |
| **Phase 2** | `finalizeForm2441PartII()` | AFTER `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()`, BEFORE `applyForm8880ToSchedule3()` | AGI + `totalTaxBeforeCredits` now available; computes Part II lines 7–11; wires line 11 into Schedule 3 line 2 |

---

## Output 1: `form1040.income.dependentCareBenefits` — Form 1040 Line 1e

### Formula (Form 2441 Part III, Phase 1)

```
totalBenefits = Σ W-2 box 10 (dependentCareBenefitsAmount)

line12 = max(0, totalBenefits − alreadyIncludedInBox1Amount)
line13 = line13GracePeriodBenefitsUsed   (user input)
line14 = line14ForfeitedOrCarriedForward (user input)
line15 = max(0, line12 + line13 − line14)

line16 = line16QualifiedExpensesForBenefits (user override) ?? sumQualifiedExpenses(qualifyingPersons)
line17 = min(line15, line16)

line18 = sumW2WagesForSsn(taxpayerSsn) + additionalEarnedIncomeTaxpayer
         then: line18 = max(line18, deemedIncomeTaxpayer)   [if student/disabled deemed applies]
line19 = MFJ  → sumW2WagesForSsn(spouseSsn) + additionalEarnedIncomeSpouse
                then: max with deemedIncomeSpouse
         else → line18

line20 = min(line17, line18, line19)

statutoryCap = (MFS AND !marriedFilingSeparatelyException) → $2,500
               otherwise                                    → $5,000
line21 = planMaxExcludable != null ? min(statutoryCap, planMaxExcludable) : statutoryCap

§129(d) bypass (employerPlanFailed129dTest == true):
  line25 = 0
  line26 = line15            ← full amount taxable
normal path:
  line25 = min(line20, line21)
  line26 = max(0, line15 − line25)

Form1040.line1e = roundMoney(line26)
```

### Always-required inputs

| Input | Source form | Firestore path | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| W-2 statement entries | W-2 statements | `users/{uid}/w-2/{id}` | Box 10 (`dependentCareBenefitsAmount`) aggregated; SSN-attributed for line 18/19 via `sumW2WagesForSsn` |
| Childcare personal form | `childcare-expenses` | `users/{uid}/childcare-expenses` | Required when `totalBenefits > 0`; emits `DEPENDENT_CARE_BENEFITS_FORM_REQUIRED` blocking flag if absent |
| Taxpayer identification | `you` | `users/{uid}/you` | SSN for W-2 box 1 attribution |
| Spouse identification | `spouse` | `users/{uid}/spouse` | SSN for spouse W-2 attribution (MFJ) |
| Filing status | `filing-status` | `users/{uid}/filing-status` | Determines `statutoryCap`, line 19 logic, MFS exception eligibility |

### Per-section inputs from `childcare-expenses`

#### `generalQuestions` section

| Field | Purpose | Effect if absent |
|---|---|---|
| `hasCareExpenses` | YES — UI gate | **NOT read by backend** — see lines/1e.md Code Validation #8 (open) |
| `didReceiveDependentCareBenefits` | Primary gate when W-2 box 10 > 0 | Hard gate; emits `DEPENDENT_CARE_BENEFITS_FORM_REQUIRED` if false/null while benefits exist |
| `marriedFilingSeparatelyException` | MFS separation exception | MFS filers use $2,500 cap |
| `studentOrDisabledDeemedIncome` + `studentOrDisabledMonths` | Deemed income for taxpayer | No deemed floor for taxpayer line 18 |
| `studentOrDisabledDeemedIncomeSpouse` + `studentOrDisabledMonthsSpouse` | Deemed income for spouse | No deemed floor for spouse line 19 |

#### `careProviders` section (display / PDF only)

| Field | Purpose | Effect if absent |
|---|---|---|
| `moreThanThreeCareProviders` | Overflow checkbox | Stored on Form 2441 output; no computation effect |
| `providers[].{providerName, Address, IdentifyingNumber, HouseholdEmployee, AmountPaid}` | Care provider detail | Stored on Form 2441 output |

#### `qualifyingPersons` section

| Field | Purpose | Effect if absent |
|---|---|---|
| `moreThanThreeQualifyingPersons` | Overflow checkbox | Display only |
| `persons[].qualifiedExpensesForPerson` | Per-person qualified expenses | Summed → `line30`; feeds Part II line 3 and optional Part III line 16 |
| `persons[].{qualifyingFirstName, LastName, SSN, Over12AndDisabled}` | Qualifying person detail | Stored on Form 2441 output |

#### `creditComputation` section

| Field | Purpose | Effect if absent |
|---|---|---|
| `priorYearQualifiedExpensesPaidThisYear` | Form 2441 line 9b (Worksheet A) | line9b = null; line9c = line9a only |

#### `dependentCareBenefits` section (Part III user inputs)

| Field | Purpose | Effect if absent |
|---|---|---|
| `alreadyIncludedInBox1Amount` | Amount already taxed in W-2 box 1; reduces line 12 | line12 = totalBenefits (no deduction) |
| `line13GracePeriodBenefitsUsed` | Prior-year unused benefits used in grace period | line13 = 0 |
| `line14ForfeitedOrCarriedForward` | Benefits forfeited or carried to next year | line14 = 0 |
| `line16QualifiedExpensesForBenefits` | Part III line 16 user override | Backend uses `sumQualifiedExpenses(qualifyingPersons)` (line30) |
| `additionalEarnedIncomeTaxpayer` | Non-W-2 earned income for taxpayer | Only W-2 wages used for line 18 |
| `additionalEarnedIncomeSpouse` | Non-W-2 earned income for spouse (MFJ only) | Only W-2 wages used for line 19 |
| `planMaxExcludable` | Employer plan max excludable (if below statutory cap) | Full statutory cap used for line 21 |
| `employerPlanFailed129dTest` | IRC §129(d) nondiscrimination test failure | Normal exclusion path; if true → line25=0, line26=line15 |

---

## Output 2: `form2441` — Full Form 2441 Output Model

The `Form2441` Java model is populated in **two passes**:

### Phase 1 fields (set by `computeDependentCareBenefits()`)

| Field | Value source |
|---|---|
| `header` | Taxpayer name + SSN from `you` form |
| `marriedFilingSeparatelyException` | From `generalQuestions.marriedFilingSeparatelyException` |
| `studentOrDisabledDeemedIncome` | From `generalQuestions.studentOrDisabledDeemedIncome` |
| `moreThanThreeCareProviders` / `moreThanThreeQualifyingPersons` | From respective sections |
| `careProviders` | Built from `careProviders.providers[]` |
| `qualifyingPersons` | Built from `qualifyingPersons.persons[]` |
| `line3TotalQualifiedExpensesLimited` | `hasBenefits ? line31 : min(line30, line27)` |
| `line4EarnedIncome` | Taxpayer earned income (= line18) |
| `line5SpouseEarnedIncomeOrLine4` | Spouse earned (MFJ) or line18 |
| `line6SmallestOf3_4_5` | `min(line3, line4, line5)` |
| `line7Agi` / `line8ApplicablePercentage` / `line9aLine6TimesPercentage` / `line9cTotalCreditBeforeLimit` / `line10TaxLiabilityLimit` / `line11ChildDependentCareCredit` | **null** (deferred to Phase 2) |
| `line9bPriorYearExpensesPaidThisYear` | From user input |
| `line12TotalDependentCareBenefits` | `max(0, totalBenefits − alreadyInBox1)` |
| `line13GracePeriodBenefitsUsed` / `line14ForfeitedOrCarriedTo2025` | From user input |
| `line15TotalBenefitsAvailable` | `max(0, line12 + line13 − line14)` |
| `line16QualifiedExpenses` | User override or `sumQualifiedExpenses` |
| `line17SmallerOf15Or16` | `min(line15, line16)` |
| `line18EarnedIncome` | Taxpayer earned (W-2 attributed + additional + deemed floor) |
| `line19SpouseEarnedIncomeOrLine18` | Spouse earned (MFJ) or line18 |
| `line20SmallestOf17_18_19` | `min(line17, line18, line19)` |
| `line21PlanLimit` | `min(statutoryCap, planMax)` or `statutoryCap` |
| `line22NoSoleProprietorshipBenefits` | Hardcoded `true` (self-employment out of scope) |
| `line22YesSoleProprietorshipBenefits` | Hardcoded `false` |
| `line22AmountFromSoleProprietorship` | Hardcoded `0` |
| `line23Line15MinusLine22` | `line15` (since line22=0) |
| `line24DeductibleBenefits` | `0` (employee-only) |
| `line25ExcludedBenefits` | §129(d)? 0 : `min(line20, line21)` |
| `line26TaxableBenefits` | §129(d)? line15 : `max(0, line15 − line25)` |
| `line27StatutoryExpenseLimit` | `$6,000` (2+ persons) or `$3,000` (1 person) |
| `line28AddLines24And25` | `line24 + line25 = line25` |
| `line29Line27MinusLine28` | `max(0, line27 − line28)` |
| `line30QualifiedExpensesExcludingBenefits` | `sumQualifiedExpenses(qualifyingPersons)` |
| `line31SmallerOf29Or30` | `min(line29, line30)` |

### Phase 2 fields (set by `finalizeForm2441PartII()`)

| Field | Value source |
|---|---|
| `line7Agi` | `form1040.adjustments.line11bAmountFromLine11aAdjustedGrossIncome` |
| `line8ApplicablePercentage` | `dependentCareApplicablePercentage(AGI)`: 35% at ≤$15k; reduced 1% per $2k over (rounded up); floor 20% |
| `line9aLine6TimesPercentage` | `line6 × line8` |
| `line9cTotalCreditBeforeLimit` | `addNonNull(line9a, line9b)` |
| `line10TaxLiabilityLimit` | `max(0, totalTaxBeforeCredits − priorSchedule3Credits)`; computed via `sumSchedule3NonrefundableCreditsExcluding5695()` which excludes `childDependentCareCredit` (not yet applied) |
| `line11ChildDependentCareCredit` | `(line9c != null) ? min(line9c, line10) : null` |

---

## Output 3: `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.childDependentCareCredit` — Schedule 3 Line 2

```
schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.childDependentCareCredit = roundMoney(form2441.line11ChildDependentCareCredit)
```

Set by `applyChildDependentCareCredit()`, which runs immediately after `finalizeForm2441PartII()` and only when line 11 > 0.

### Downstream effects

```
schedule3.totalNonrefundableCredits (line 8) includes childDependentCareCredit
→ computeLine20ThroughLine24() uses line 8 total → Form 1040 line 20 → line 22
```

`line11` is null when:
- No qualifying persons and no care expenses were entered, OR
- AGI is null at compute time (degenerate case)
- `totalTaxBeforeCredits = 0` → `line10 = 0` → `line11 = 0` (not null, but zero credit)

---

## Earned Income Attribution (W-2 SSN Matching)

The backend uses `sumW2WagesForSsn(w2Entries, ssn)` to attribute W-2 wages per person:

| Condition | Taxpayer line 18 | Spouse line 19 |
|---|---|---|
| Both SSNs present and matched | W-2 box 1 attributed to taxpayer SSN + additional | W-2 box 1 attributed to spouse SSN + additional (MFJ) |
| `sumW2WagesForSsn` returns null (no SSN match) | Falls back to `sumW2Wages(w2Entries)` (all wages) | 0 |
| `additionalEarnedIncomeTaxpayer` / `Spouse` present | Added after SSN attribution | Added after SSN attribution |
| Deemed income applies AND deemed > W-2 attributed | `max(W2attributed, deemedMonthly × months)` | Same for spouse |

Deemed monthly amounts: **$500/month** when 2+ qualifying persons; **$250/month** when 1 qualifying person (IRC §21(d)(2); Pub 503).

Inmate wages are subtracted from the SSN-attributed W-2 total per person (Pub 503 carve-out).

---

## Credit Limit Worksheet (Line 10) — Phase 2

The CLW sums all **prior** Schedule 3 nonrefundable credits already applied at the time `finalizeForm2441PartII()` runs:

| Schedule 3 position | Credit | Included in CLW? |
|---|---|---|
| Line 1 | Foreign tax credit (Form 1116) | **Yes** — already applied by `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()` |
| Line 2 | Child/dep care credit (Form 2441 line 11) | **No** — this is what we are computing |
| Line 3 | Education credits (Form 8863) | **No** — runs after Phase 2 |
| Line 4 | Retirement savings credit (Form 8880) | **No** — runs after Phase 2 |
| Line 5 | Clean vehicle credit | **No** |
| Lines 6a–6l | Various (5695, adoption, 8801, etc.) | **No** |

The CLW uses `sumSchedule3NonrefundableCreditsExcluding5695()`, which sums all nonrefundable credit fields non-null at that moment. Since `childDependentCareCredit` has not been set yet (it is set by the subsequent `applyChildDependentCareCredit()`), it correctly contributes zero.

Execution order that makes the CLW correct:

```
computeLine18()                                        → totalTaxBeforeCredits available
computeForm1116() → applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3() → Schedule 3 line 1 set
finalizeForm2441PartII()                                → reads line 1 (yes) and line 2 (null = correct)
applyChildDependentCareCredit()                         → Schedule 3 line 2 set
computeForm8880() → applyForm8880ToSchedule3()         → Form 8880 CLW now sees line 2
finalizeSchedule3Totals()                               → line 8 total includes line 2
```

---

## MFS Separation Exception

When `filingStatus == "Married filing separately"` AND `marriedFilingSeparatelyException == true`:

- Taxpayer is treated as **unmarried** for Form 2441 purposes (IRC §21(e)(2));
- `statutoryCap = $5,000` (not $2,500);
- Part II credit is available (ordinary MFS filers have no credit).

The exception requires: lived apart from spouse for the last 6 months of the year AND maintained a home for a qualifying person for more than half the year AND paid more than half the cost of maintaining the home. Backend trusts the user's self-declaration; no independent verification.

---

## §129(d) Nondiscrimination Bypass

When `employerPlanFailed129dTest == true`:

- IRC §129(d) requires employer-sponsored dependent care plans to pass a nondiscrimination test.
- If the plan fails, highly compensated employees cannot exclude any benefits.
- Backend effect: `line25 = 0`, `line26 = line15` — the full available benefit amount flows to line 1e as taxable income.
- `line21` is still computed (set on Form 2441 output for display) but has no computational effect.

---

## Validation Flags (Blocking)

| Flag | Condition | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `DEPENDENT_CARE_BENEFITS_FORM_REQUIRED` | `totalBenefits > 0` (W-2 box 10 > 0) AND `childcareExpenses` personal form is null/absent (OR `didReceiveDependentCareBenefits != true`) | Blocking. Form 1040 line 1e cannot be computed without the personal form |

Line 1e has a SINGLE blocking flag (compared to line 1d's seven). Most data-quality issues silently default to safe values.

---

## Absence / Missing-data Behaviour

| Missing input | Backend behaviour |
|---|---|
| `childcare-expenses` form not saved AND `totalBenefits = 0` | `dependentCare = null`; no Form 2441 on output; line 1e = null |
| `childcare-expenses` form not saved AND `totalBenefits > 0` | Emits `DEPENDENT_CARE_BENEFITS_FORM_REQUIRED` (blocking); line 1e uncomputed |
| `didReceiveDependentCareBenefits = false` or absent | Part III excluded; line26=0; only Part II credit from direct expenses |
| Qualifying persons list empty | `line30 = 0`; Part II line 3 = 0; no credit |
| Care providers list empty | Form 2441 output has empty providers list; no computation effect |
| AGI null in Phase 2 | `finalizeForm2441PartII()` returns early; lines 7/8/9a/9c/10/11 remain null |
| `totalTaxBeforeCredits = 0` | `line10 = 0`; `line11 = 0`; credit wired as zero |
| `planMaxExcludable` absent | `line21 = statutoryCap` (full $5,000 or $2,500) |
| Both `additionalEarned*` absent | No change to W-2-attributed earned income |
| Earned income = 0 for both spouses (no deemed) | line20 = 0 → line25 = 0 → line26 = line15 (taxable) |
| Qualifying-person count = 0 with positive expenses | line27 = $3,000 (default tier) |
| `planMaxExcludable > statutoryCap` | line21 = statutory cap (min wins) |
| line14 (forfeited) > line12 + line13 | line15 = max(0, ...) → 0 |
| Filing status not saved | Defaults to non-MFS; $5,000 cap applied |

---

## Reference Data

| Constant | Value | Source | Used by |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DEPENDENT_CARE_BENEFITS_LIMIT_OTHER` | $5,000 | `ReferenceData`; IRC §129(a)(2)(A) | Statutory cap (non-MFS or MFS-with-exception) |
| `DEPENDENT_CARE_BENEFITS_LIMIT_MFS` | $2,500 | `ReferenceData`; IRC §129(a)(2)(A) | Statutory cap (MFS without exception) |
| `DEPENDENT_CARE_EXPENSE_LIMIT_ONE` | $3,000 | `ReferenceData`; IRC §21(c) | Line 27 (1 qualifying person) |
| `DEPENDENT_CARE_EXPENSE_LIMIT_TWO_OR_MORE` | $6,000 | `ReferenceData`; IRC §21(c) | Line 27 (2+ qualifying persons) |
| Deemed income — 1 person | $250/month (hardcoded) | IRC §21(d)(2); Pub 503 | Lines 18/19 floor |
| Deemed income — 2+ persons | $500/month (hardcoded) | IRC §21(d)(2); Pub 503 | Lines 18/19 floor |
| Applicable percentage table | 35% at ≤$15,000; reduced 1% per $2,000 over (rounded up); floor 20% | IRC §21(a)(2) | Phase 2 line 8 (`dependentCareApplicablePercentage(agi)`) |

---

## Compute Order

**Phase 1 (inside `prepare()`, before AGI):**
1. **`computeDependentCareBenefits(childcareData, filingStatus, you, spouse, w2Entries, ...)`** — orchestrator.
2. **`hasAnyChildcareData(...)`** — empty-data predicate.
3. **`sumW2WagesForSsn(w2Entries, ssn)`** — SSN-attributed wages (raw box 1, with per-person inmate-wage subtraction applied post-hoc).
4. **`clampMonths(months)`** — clamps student/disabled months to [0,12].
5. **`buildIncome()`** → `income.dependentCareBenefits = roundMoney(line26)` only when non-null.

**Phase 2 (after FTC, before Form 8880):**
6. **`finalizeForm2441PartII(dependentCare, form1040, schedule3)`** — completes lines 7–11.
7. **`dependentCareApplicablePercentage(agi)`** — sliding scale.
8. **`applyChildDependentCareCredit(schedule3, dependentCare)`** — sets `schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.childDependentCareCredit`.

---

## Cross-line Consistency

- **Line 1e feeds `line1z`:** `line1z = 1a + 1b + 1c + 1d + 1e + 1f + 1g + 1h + 1i`. Line 1z feeds line 9 (total income).
- **Schedule 3 line 2 feeds line 20.** Via `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` → `computeLine20ThroughLine24()`. The credit reduces tax liability (nonrefundable).
- **Form 8880 CLW uses line 2.** The retirement savings credit CLW deducts prior Schedule 3 credits including Form 2441 line 2. `applyChildDependentCareCredit()` must complete before `computeForm8880()`.
- **Line 1e is the gross inclusion; NO offsetting Schedule 1 line.** Unlike line 1d (Medicaid waiver), there is no negative Schedule 1 entry. The portion flowing to line 1e (line26) is fully taxable.
- **Part III line 21 limits the exclusion; line 11 limits the credit.** Independent ceilings — both can apply when the return has both qualifying persons and employer-provided benefits.
- AGI from Phase 1 (via line 1e) feeds back into the Phase 2 applicable-percentage table — closing the two-pass loop.

---

## Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | How it uses line 1e |
|---|---|
| Form 1040 line 1z | Direct addNonNull aggregation |
| Form 1040 line 9 → AGI (line 11) | Via 1z; AGI feeds Phase 2 applicable-percentage table |
| Pub 915 SS Worksheet 1 line 3 | Via line 1z |
| EIC earned income (line 27a) | Wages-side aggregation |
| Schedule 8812 / ACTC | Same wages-side aggregation |
| Form 2441 Part II line 4 (earned income) | Reuses Phase 1's `line18` |

---

## Deferred / Not Yet Wired

| Item | Status |
|---|---|
| Line 22 sole proprietorship / partnership (IRC §129(e)(3)) | Hardcoded to `No/$0`; self-employment path out of scope |
| Worksheet A (line 9b prior-year expenses) | User-entered manual input; backend accepts the value but does not compute it from statement data |
| Part II line 2 (care providers detail) | Stored for display/PDF; persisted and rendered but no completeness validation |
| Form 2441 Part I (Box A MFS exception, Box B deemed income checkbox) | Set on Form 2441 output as flags; no computation gating beyond `marriedFilingSeparatelyException` |
| Employer plan §129(d) verification | User self-declaration; backend trusts `employerPlanFailed129dTest` |
| MFS-no-exception credit blocking | Open — `finalizeForm2441PartII` / `applyChildDependentCareCredit` do not block Part II credit on MFS without exception (lines/1e.md Code Validation #1) |
| MFS orchestrator guard | Open — defensive pattern (lines/1e.md Code Validation #2) |
| "DCB" write-in label on PDF | Open — label not rendered on PDF overlay (lines/1e.md Code Validation #3) |
| Over-broad `hasAnyChildcareData` predicate | Open — generates noisy Form 2441 zero rows |
| Zero-spouse-earned-income advisory | Open — UX trap; advisory flag would help |
| `hasCareExpenses` outer gate not read | Open — dual-layer fix recommended (lines/1e.md Code Validation #8) |
